# Buildwise Media — Full Machine-Readable Content
> AI-powered marketing engines for service businesses
> Last updated: 2026-03-21

## Company Overview
Buildwise Media is an AI-native marketing agency headquartered in Atlanta, GA. We build done-for-you marketing systems ("Revenue Engines") for service businesses across North America. Our approach combines AI-powered production (85% automated) with human quality gates to deliver enterprise-grade marketing at service business price points.

## Legal
- Legal Name: Buildwise Media LLC
- Location: Atlanta, GA, United States
- Email: hello@buildwisemedia.com
- Phone: +14049993258

## Service Tier: Ascend — Full-Service AI Marketing

### Pricing
- Monthly retainer: $7,000/month
- Engine Build fee: $4,500 (one-time at signing)
- Includes: $1,000/month ad spend allocation (no management fee on ad spend)
- Contract: Month-to-month Client Services Agreement
- Cancellation: 30-day notice
- Ownership: Client owns all assets

### Deliverables
1. Custom Website — Cloudflare Pages, 90+ PageSpeed, schema-marked, SEO-optimized, on client's domain
2. Content Production — Social posts, graphics, video, scheduled and published across all channels
3. Paid Ads Management — Meta + Google ads managed against revenue targets
4. AI Business Tools — Chatbot, AI phone system, appointment booking, review management
5. Strategy & Analytics — GA4 dashboard, monthly performance reviews, data-driven adjustments
6. Brand Identity — Voice card, visual system, messaging framework (client-owned)

### Ideal Customer Profile
- Service businesses (home services, medical aesthetics, dental, construction)
- Established with proven service and happy customers
- Revenue-generating, seeking consistent lead flow
- Ready to delegate marketing entirely
- North America

### Timeline
- Phase 1 (Discovery): Weeks 1-3 — Business research, brand voice, competitive analysis, marketing strategy
- Phase 2 (Build): Weeks 4-8 — Website, content system, ad campaigns, AI tools built and tested
- Phase 3 (Run): Week 9+ — Engine live, pipeline filling, ongoing optimization

## Industries Served

### Tier 1 (Primary Focus)
1. [HVAC / Plumbing / Electrical](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/hvac-plumbing-electrical) — "Your phone goes silent in February. It doesn't have to."
2. [Med Spas & Aesthetic Clinics](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/med-spas) — "New patient bookings dried up. Let's fix that."
3. [Custom Home Builders & Remodelers](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/home-builders-remodelers) — "Your last project finished. Your pipeline didn't."

### Tier 2
4. [Roofing](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/roofing) — "Storm season is coming. Is your marketing ready?"
5. [Pest Control & Wildlife](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/pest-control) — "Recurring revenue needs recurring visibility."
6. [Luxury Landscaping & Hardscaping](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/luxury-landscaping) — "Premium work deserves premium clients."

### Tier 3
7. [Custom Pools & Outdoor Living](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/custom-pools) — "Dream backyards don't sell themselves."
8. [High-End Dental & Orthodontics](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/dental) — "Empty chairs cost more than marketing."
9. [Concrete & Flatwork](https://buildwisemedia.com/industries/concrete) — "Keep your trucks rolling year-round."

## The Poor Four — Problems We Solve
1. Lead Droughts — Feast-or-famine pipeline with no system, just hope
2. Owner Trap — Business owner IS the marketing department
3. Manual Mayhem — Every campaign, post, and follow-up is manual
4. Reactive Mode — Always firefighting instead of building

## Results
- $10M+ revenue generated for a single client in one year ($300K → $10M trajectory)
- 3-5x lead increase (average across client base)
- 18+ hours saved per week (automation time displacement)
- 90 days to ROI (Revenue Engine build timeline)
- 34 booked jobs in first 30 days (roofing company)

## Engineering Standards
- 90+ PageSpeed score on every site (Core Web Vitals compliant)
- 71 documented processes (every workflow, checklist, quality gate written)
- 8/10 quality threshold (content scored against rubric before publishing)
- 6 schema types per page (LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Offer, Organization)
- 47-point QA checklist before any site goes live
- Lighthouse audit on every deployment

## Company Values (The BWM Four)
1. GSD (Get Stuff Done) — Ship every week, no months-long strategy phases
2. Integrity — Month-to-month agreement, no lock-in, say what we'll do and do what we say
3. Excellence — 47-point QA, PageSpeed 90+, schema markup on every page, engineering standards
4. Add the Light — Business should serve life, build systems that give time back

## FAQ

Q: What types of businesses do you work with?
A: Service businesses across North America — HVAC, plumbing, roofing, remodeling, pest control, med spas, dental practices, landscaping, concrete, and more. If your business depends on booked appointments and a full pipeline, we can help.

Q: How is this different from other marketing agencies?
A: Most agencies sell deliverables. We build an integrated marketing engine powered by AI that runs your content, ads, website, and automation as a single system. 71 documented processes, enterprise-grade execution, and every asset is yours to keep. Month-to-month, no lock-in.

Q: What does "you own everything" actually mean?
A: Every website, every ad account, every piece of content, every automation lives in accounts you own. If you leave, nothing disappears. No hostage situations, no proprietary platforms.

Q: How long until I see results?
A: Most clients see pipeline activity within the first month. Full Revenue Engine is live within 90 days. Results compound month over month.

Q: What if I want to cancel?
A: Cancel anytime. Month-to-month, no long-term lock-in. When you leave, you keep every asset we built.

## Technical Stack
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages (static HTML)
- CSS: Tailwind-inspired custom CSS with Forged Earth design system
- JavaScript: Vanilla JS (no frameworks)
- Fonts: Manrope (headings), Inter (body), Playfair Display (accent)
- Analytics: GA4 via GTM, Meta Pixel, Microsoft Clarity
- Booking: Cal.com (self-hosted at book.buildwisemedia.com)
- CRM: GoHighLevel
- Assets: Cloudflare R2 CDN (assets.buildwisemedia.com)

## Structured Data Available
JSON-LD schemas on every page: LocalBusiness, Organization, FAQPage, Service (with pricing on /services/ascend), BreadcrumbList, Offer
